query: SELECT pq.categoryId, COUNT(*) as count, pc.name, pc.positionId FROM position_questions pq LEFT JOIN position_categories pc ON pq.categoryId = pc.id GROUP BY pq.categoryId ORDER BY pq.categoryId;
